About the Doctor

Holistic healer combining traditional Ayurveda with modern therapies

DV

Dr. D. Viswanadham

Experienced holistic health practitioner with Honorary Doctorate in Ayurvedic Medicine, specializing in Ayurveda, Marmatherapy, acupuncture and acupressure. Odisha State Convenor — Acupuncture Science Practitioners Association. Serving patients since 1992.

Honorary Doctorate – Ayurveda MD Ayurveda & Yoga Vaidya Ratna 2020 Padma Bhushan Award 2026 Odisha State Convenor – ASPA

🎓 Educational Qualifications

  • Honorary Doctorate in Ayurvedic Medicine – WCEPC, 2025
  • MD Ayurveda & Yoga – World Cultural & Educational Org, 2026
  • Diploma in Acupuncture – BSS, Indian Oam 2020
  • Diploma in Ayurveda, Yoga & Panchakarma – BSS, Indian Oam 2019
  • Diploma in Acupressure – BSS, Indian Oam 2020
  • Intermediate Science – Andhra Pradesh Open University (60%) 2018
  • Matriculation – Andhra Pradesh Board (70%) 1992

🏥 Other Qualifications & Experience

  • Bhartiya Padma Bhushan Award – Ayurved & Yoga, 2026
  • Vaidya Ratna Award – NYK Indian OAM, 2020
  • Odisha State Convenor – Acupuncture Science Practitioners Association
  • Experience treating chronic pain, lifestyle disorders
  • Respiratory, digestive & stress-related conditions

Treatments & Therapies

Traditional and holistic treatments for complete wellbeing

🪡
Acupuncture Therapy
Traditional needle therapy for pain management, migraine, nerve disorders, back pain and chronic conditions. BSS Diploma certified 2020.
👐
Acupressure
Pressure-point therapy for stress, high blood pressure, joint pain, headache and digestive disorders. Non-invasive and drug-free healing. BSS Diploma 2020.
🧘
Yoga Therapy
Therapeutic yoga guidance for lifestyle disorders, flexibility, respiratory health, stress management and mental wellness. BSS Diploma Ayurveda & Yoga 2019.
🫙
Panchakarma
Five-fold Ayurvedic detoxification and rejuvenation therapy. Includes Abhyanga, Swedana and herbal treatments for deep cleansing and body balance.
🌿
Ayurvedic Consultation
Personalized Ayurvedic diagnosis based on Prakriti (body constitution), herbal medicine prescription, diet and lifestyle recommendations.
🩺
Marmatherapy
Ancient Indian healing through 107 vital energy (marma) points. Treats chronic pain, paralysis, nerve disorders and restores energy balance without medicines.
